FX.title: USD/JPY at 150: Technical Resistance and Fed Policy Divergence Create High Volatility Scenario
tldr_points: Japan Services PMI contraction heightens JPY vulnerability
Fed's inflation caution delays rate-cut expectations
Critical RSI divergence precedes 150 key level test
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY faces pivotal resistance at 150 as Fed policy divergence and mixed PMI data fuel divergent risk appetite.
FX.comment: Confluence of Fed-driven USD strength and technical resistance creates high probability breakout scenario.

CRYPTO.title: Bitcoin Technicals Signal Imminent Breakout Amid AI and On-Chain Developments
